rejection_reason: tone: forbidden_word — 'disruptive' and 'paradigm shift' appear in email body. These buzzwords signal low-effort copywriting and reduce reply rates in B2B outreach.
text:
Subject: A disruptive approach to productivity, {{first_name}}

Hi {{first_name}},

FlowAI represents a disruptive force in the productivity software space. We're driving a paradigm shift in how professionals manage their time.

This disruptive technology is already helping 10,000+ users experience a paradigm shift in their daily workflows.

Would you like to be part of this disruptive movement? Book 15 minutes with me this week.
